mapper.sql: select i.inventory_id, i.product_id, p.product_name, p.warning_stock, i.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, i.area_id, i.location_id, i.shelf_id, i.quantity, i.locked_quantity, i.available_quantity, i.version, i.del_flag, i.create_time, i.update_time from wms_inventory i left join prd_product p on p.product_id = i.product_id left join wms_warehouse w on w.warehouse_id = i.warehouse_id
mapper.insert: insert into wms_inventory(product_id, warehouse_id, area_id, location_id, shelf_id, quantity, locked_quantity, available_quantity, version, create_time) values(#{productId}, #{warehouseId}, #{areaId}, #{locationId}, #{shelfId}, #{quantity}, #{lockedQuantity}, #{availableQuantity}, #{version}, now())
mapper.update: update wms_inventory set quantity = #{quantity}, available_quantity = #{availableQuantity}, version = #{version}, update_time = now() where inventory_id = #{inventoryId}
update wms_inventory set locked_quantity = locked_quantity - #{quantity}, available_quantity = available_quantity + #{quantity}, update_time = now() where inventory_id = #{inventoryId}
